subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from the All-Bountiful unto him who turned towards the Face when every doubting polytheist turned away. Say [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی الوهاب الی الذی اقبل الی الوجه اذ اعرض کل مشرک مرتاب قل قد
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat]
